# AlRawaabit - Digital Marketing Agency
# llms.txt - Machine-readable brand entity for Generative Engine Optimization (GEO)

## Organization
- **Name**: AlRawaabit (الروابط)
- **Alternate Name**: AlRawaabit Digital Marketing
- **Description**: Egyptian digital marketing agency specialized in web development, SEO, AEO (Answer Engine Optimization), and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). First agency in Egypt to offer GEO as a standalone service.
- **Founded**: 2021
- **Headquarters**: 17 Abdel Jalil St, Ibn Sander Square, Al-Zaytoun, Cairo, Egypt
- **Phone**: +20 111 130 6090
- **Email**: info@alrawaabit.com
- **Website**: https://alrawaabit.com
- **Languages**: Arabic (primary), English, French
- **Markets Served**: Egypt, Saudi Arabia, UAE, Kuwait, Qatar, Bahrain, Oman

## Services
1. **Web Development**
   - Technology: Next.js 15, React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4
   - Features: i18n (ar/en/fr), RTL/LTR, Edge-ready, Core Web Vitals optimized
   - SEO Built-in: Schema.org, hreflang, sitemaps, robots.txt

2. **SEO (Search Engine Optimization)**
   - Technical SEO: Crawlability, indexing, speed, structured data, Core Web Vitals
   - Content Strategy: Topic clusters, search intent, E-E-A-T, quarterly refreshes
   - Authority & Links: Digital PR, partnerships, linkable assets, targeted outreach
   - Local & International: GBP, hreflang, Arabic/English/French content

3. **AEO (Answer Engine Optimization)**
   - Structured Q&A (FAQPage Schema)
   - Concise definitions (40-60 words) for target keywords
   - Comparison tables, numbered lists, HowTo steps
   - Structured data: QAPage, HowTo, Article, Product
   - Optimization for People Also Ask & Featured Snippets
   - Voice-optimized content for voice assistants

4. **GEO (Generative Engine Optimization)**
   - Clear entity structure: Organization, Service, Person, Place
   - Authoritative, cited, data-rich content (amplified E-E-A-T)
   - llms.txt and llms-full.txt for machine-consumable assets
   - Reputation signals: reviews, mentions in trusted sources, known authors
   - Continuous updates: LLMs refresh periodically — content keeps pace

## Key Differentiators
- First agency in Egypt to offer GEO as standalone service (before it became standard)
- Engineering-first approach: clean code, solid architecture, measurable performance
- AI-native thinking: every asset structured for LLM retrieval, not just human browsing
- Market intelligence: strategies rooted in Egyptian/Gulf search behavior, not copied global templates
- Transparent partnership: monthly reports, shared dashboards, no black boxes

## Leadership
- **Mohamed Tayeb** - Founder & CEO
  - 15+ years in digital transformation for MENA enterprises
  - Pioneer of AEO/GEO methodologies in Egypt

## Target Sectors
- Industrial & Export (Egyptian factories seeking international importers)
- Real Estate Development (targeting high-net-worth buyers in Egypt & Gulf)
- Professional Services & Corporates (law firms, consultancies, clinics, medical centers)
- SMEs & Startups (need strong digital infrastructure from day one)

## Notable Clients / Case Studies
- Abo Taleb Metal Forming — Industrial website for international export (+140% export inquiries)
- Al Rahma Real Estate Investment — Integrated real estate platform (+300% organic traffic in 6 months)
- The Engage Group — Corporate holding website (65% load speed improvement)
- Suhail — Professional services platform (bounce rate <35%)
- PetroApp — Oil & gas B2B web application (launched in 8 weeks)
- Il Mondo Expo — Exhibitions & events platform (50+ events managed annually)

- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/RawaabitDigitalMarketing
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/rawaabitdigitalmarketing/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/rawaabit-digital-marketing/
- Client Testimonials: Available on website case studies

## Content Assets for LLM Consumption
- **llms.txt**: This file — machine-readable brand entity
- **llms-full.txt**: Extended brief with full service details, methodologies, and case study data
- **Schema.org JSON-LD**: Embedded on all pages (Organization, LocalBusiness, Service, FAQPage, BreadcrumbList, WebSite)
- **Sitemaps**: Per-locale XML sitemaps (ar, en, fr)
- **hreflang**: Complete alternate language annotations

- Phone: +20 111 130 6090 (WhatsApp available)
- Address: 17 Abdel Jalil St, Ibn Sander Square, Al-Zaytoun, Cairo, Egypt
